summary: First iteration test of Daftari (دفتري) Arabic RTL mobile app. Backend: 10/10 pytest tests pass covering auth (register/login/me), customer CRUD, transactions CRUD, summary aggregate, search, amount/type validation, and cross-user isolation. Frontend: Full E2E on mobile viewport (390x844) succeeded — sign-up creates user & routes to home; RTL layout renders correctly; add-customer flow works; customer detail screen shows balance, WhatsApp button, debt/payment actions; add-transaction flow (debt 100, payment 30) updates balance to 70 dinar and home total-debt-amount to 70; sign-out returns to sign-in screen. Two React Native web dev warnings observed (non-blocking).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Affects home.tsx totalCard/customerCard/fab, sign-in.tsx logoCircle/form, customer/[id].tsx balanceCard/waBtn/actionBtn, add-transaction.tsx. Non-blocking on RN native (shadow* still works), but React Native Web logs this. Consider migrating to boxShadow or platform-guarded styles.

Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Likely originates from a dependency (react-native-safe-area-context / keyboard-controller). No app code change required unless the library version is upgradable.

action_items: Optional: replace shadow* StyleSheet props with boxShadow (or wrap in Platform.select) to silence RN Web deprecation warnings.

Optional: on customer detail, the newly-created customer's balance may briefly show stale value right after add-transaction until useFocusEffect refetches — worked correctly during test (balance updated to 100 then 70) but consider showing a loader during refetch.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/customers/summary correctly placed BEFORE /api/customers/{customer_id} — good route ordering, no shadowing.
server.py: MongoDB _id excluded via projection {'_id': 0} everywhere — good.

server.py: total_debt is computed on every list_customers request via N+1 async calls to compute_customer_totals. Fine for small shops but consider a single aggregation pipeline if customer counts grow >100.
server.py: passlib bcrypt / jose JWT imports OK; SECRET_KEY has hardcoded default fallback — acceptable for MVP but recommend enforcing JWT_SECRET_KEY env var in production.
Frontend api.ts: uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL correctly; all requests prefixed with /api.
Frontend uses testID on all key interactive elements — great for testing.
Frontend forces RTL via I18nManager in root _layout — Arabic layout renders correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of user-facing flows (register, add customer, add debt, add payment, balance math, sign-out, sign-in reload)

seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral users (test_a_*, test_b_*, e2e_*) and one customer 'أحمد التجربة'. Customers created by isolation tests are cleaned up. The frontend E2E leaves one persisted user + customer for user 'e2e_595278' — non-impacting.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_daftari_backend.py is reusable for regression. All routes prefixed /api. Auth is JWT bearer. All flows tested end-to-end and passing. Public URL: https://bill-keeper-7.preview.emergentagent.com.
